#   pip-compile --generate-hashes requirements.in -o requirements.txt
# To audit for CVEs:
#   pip-audit -r requirements.txt

# NOTE: torch, torchaudio, silero-vad, and faster-whisper are platform-specific.
# Full nodes (Pi 5 + CUDA): versions depend on the CUDA/ARM toolchain.
# Capture nodes (Pi 4): only sounddevice, httpx, pydantic, python-dotenv, numpy.
#
# Verified against: Python 3.12 / blackmagic.lan (x86_64, dev environment)
# Last locked: 2026-03-27
